positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a cosmic forest: silhouetted, majestic trees with glowing, bioluminescent foliage that mimic constellations. The scene should feature wandering, celestial fauna like stylized moon deer and nebula-winged moths. Use deep indigo, vibrant teal, and glowing gold accents against a pitch-black background. The overall composition must be central and symmetrical, with excellent contrast and clean, sharp lines suitable for screen printing on apparel. Geometric and organic elements should intertwine seamlessly. Style: Art Nouveau meets cosmic vaporwave.
